description_long: This armchair features a high, winged backrest and broad, padded armrests, all upholstered in a deep green, textured material with a subtle, scale-like pattern. The seat is wide and flat, providing ample sitting space, and the upholstery is accented with metallic studs along the front edges of the armrests. The chair stands on four short, rounded wooden legs, which contrast with the dark green upholstery. The back of the chair is fully covered in the same patterned material, giving it a cohesive and finished appearance from all sides. The overall design is robust and traditional, suggesting comfort and durability suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban settings. The armchair's structure appears to be reinforced with an internal wooden or metal frame beneath the upholstery.
description: A high-backed, winged armchair with deep green, textured upholstery and rounded wooden legs, featuring broad padded armrests and metallic stud accents.
description_view_0: Front view shows the high, winged backrest, broad padded armrests, and the wide seat with metallic stud accents.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the chair's depth, thick cushioning, and the rounded wooden legs beneath the seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full height and width of the backrest, covered in the same green textured upholstery, and the symmetry of the design.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest profile, seat depth, and rounded wooden legs.
attribute_armrest_design: broad, padded and upholstered with metallic stud accents
attribute_backrest_style: high and winged, fully upholstered, with a gently curved top edge
